title: crotalaria pygmaea
intro: Crotalaria pygmaea is a small shrub-like plant belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Crotalaria pygmaea is often prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
